hooks.command: bash -c 'if [[ "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" == *.kt || "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" == *.kts ]]; then cd /home/jmonk/git/lsp-types-kotlin && JAVA_HOME=/usr/lib/jvm/java-21-openjdk ./gradlew ktlintFormat --quiet 2>/dev/null; fi'
echo '\n--- Post-task reminder: Run tests + lint before considering work complete ---\nJAVA_HOME=/usr/lib/jvm/java-21-openjdk ./gradlew allTests ktlintCheck'
